query_text: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus kidney biopsy (lupus nephritis class III-V) or skin biopsy with matched serum. ANA and anti-dsDNA documented. ISN/RPS class documented for renal. N >= 20.

parsed.disease_subtype: Lupus nephritis class III, IV, or V
parsed.assay_context: SLE renal and cutaneous tissue biomarker profiling, immune cell infiltrate characterization
